steps.t: Gwynna and Olwen can be found in Tûr Morva. Maelona told you that some of her fellows are distrustful of hobbits, having never seen one before, and yo…
Maelona is in Tûr Morva. Maelona will want to speak with you once you have regaled Gwynna and Olwen with tales of your homeland.
Penrod, the first Brehur of Lheu Brenin, is in Tûr Morva. He has been asking for you. Maelona told you to speak with Penrod now that you have reassure…
